## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Not run; explain below

## Security and Data Impact

Does this change affect authentication, protected routes, Supabase queries, Row Level Security, financial records, or personal metric data?

If yes, explain the expected data access behavior and how unauthorized access was considered.

## Screenshots

Attach screenshots for UI changes. Use sample data only.
